source_file: THE REGULATION OF FINANCIAL PRIVACY- THE UNITED STATES VS EUROPE.txt
text:
16
   This regulation does not necessarily have to be established under a central authority of a data
protection officer. As far as judicial courts or governmental departments are involved, the author granted
a positive value in the evaluation.

17
                                                 NICOLA JENTZSCH
